name: seamos-everywhere
description: SeamOS AI Native developer plugin — build, test, and deploy agricultural machinery apps using natural language through Claude Code

seamos_api_url.title: SeamOS API URL
seamos_api_url.description: SeamOS API base URL (e.g. https://marketplace-api.seamos.io). The first MCP call opens a browser for one-time SeamOS login (OAuth PKCE); no API key required.
